allBrands: All your favorite brands in one store.
easyReturnsDesc: Easy Returns! Change your mind, no hassle! Just contact us.
orderTrackingDesc: Track your order from payment to doorstep!
noProductsFound: Sorry, no products found matching your search.
searchItemsWillAppear: Items matching your search will appear here.
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Essence, a demo e-commerce website. Feel free to browse all features. Any data you enter will never be recorded. Any order you make will never be processed.
aboutWelcome: Welcome to Essence, a demo clothing brand designed to showcase my work in web design, branding, and digital creativity. This is not a real brand but a fully functional example of how an eCommerce fashion website could look and feel. The website is fully functional!
aboutDemonstration: Through Essence, I demonstrate my ability to craft modern, stylish, and user-friendly websites that bring brands to life. From sleek product displays to seamless navigation and engaging visuals, every element is designed to reflect a premium online shopping experience.
aboutCustomWebsite: Whether you're looking for a professional website for your brand or need a creative portfolio to showcase your products, this demo serves as a testament to what I can build. If you're interested in a custom website tailored to your business, feel free to reach out!
returnInstructions: Return items by specifying what you want to send back. For exchanges, include the item and desired replacement.
